name: general-purpose
description: Default multi-step agent — handles complex tasks autonomously including code search, research, file editing, and multi-tool orchestration.

name: Explore
description: Fast codebase exploration agent — finds files by pattern, searches code for keywords, answers architecture questions. Supports quick/medium/thorough depth levels.

name: Plan
description: Software architect agent — designs implementation plans, identifies critical files, considers architectural trade-offs. Returns step-by-step strategies.

name: claude-code-guide
description: Documentation agent — answers questions about Claude Code features, hooks, slash commands, MCP servers, IDE integrations, Agent SDK, and Anthropic API.

name: scrapling-spider-builder
description: Custom agent for building, debugging, and optimizing Scrapling web scraping spiders with TLS fingerprinting bypass and CSS/XPath selectors.

name: fixer-github
description: Slash command for automated GitHub repository fixes — linting, formatting, and issue resolution across repos.

name: pr-inbox
description: Slash command for managing pull request inbox — review, triage, and respond to open PRs.

name: scan-dashboard
description: Slash command that scans the system for Claude tools, git repos, archived repos, and infrastructure changes — diffs against dashboard data files and updates with confirmation.

name: update-dashboard
description: Auto-sync Agent Command Center — runs drift scan, applies all updates to JSON data files, verifies build, commits and pushes to GitHub.
